title: Delete specific files from files column using asset IDs
excerpt: I propose a use case for deleting specific files(assets) from the Files column using monday API. Given the availability of asset IDs, integrating a feature to delete assets using these IDs would enhance workflow efficien…

posts.author: YuvrajSingh (Yuvraj Singh Rajput)
posts.cookedHtml: I propose a use case for deleting specific files(assets) from the Files column using monday API. Given the availability of asset IDs, integrating a feature to delete assets using these IDs would enhance workflow efficiency.
